usage.selection: Read this compact index first to select a poster style family.
usage.details: After selecting a family, read the listed reference files only.
usage.assets: Use asset_map entries to place exact logo and culture assets.

style_families.name: Corporate Blue Orange
style_families.best_for: Group brand posters, formal announcements, strategy, external-facing communication, service positioning, executive/internal authority contexts.
style_families.avoid_for: Very playful employee culture scenes where value IP should lead.
style_families.typography: Source Han Sans / 思源黑体

style_families.name: Values IP Card
style_families.best_for: Values posters, culture communication, employee engagement, festival greetings, internal recognition, team activities.
style_families.avoid_for: Board, legal, compliance, investor, or serious external posters.
style_families.typography: Rounded bold display plus Source Han Sans body

style_families.name: Meeting Room Screen
style_families.best_for: Feishu projection posters, meeting-room screens, 16:9 agenda or recognition screen visuals.
style_families.avoid_for: Long mobile posters and dense reading materials.
style_families.typography: Large Source Han Sans / 思源黑体

style_families.name: HRAS Sub-Brand
style_families.best_for: HRAS, 人力综合条线, employee service, HR operations, onboarding, internal HR campaigns.
style_families.avoid_for: General group brand posters unrelated to HRAS.
style_families.typography: Source Han Sans / 思源黑体

style_families.name: Event Campaign
style_families.best_for: Internal activity posters, campaign teasers, holiday posters, recognition announcements, mixed culture-brand visuals.
style_families.avoid_for: Highly formal group identity pages requiring strict VI restraint.
style_families.typography: Strong Source Han Sans headlines with friendly accent treatments
